name: DDLC: Your Wife, Yuri. 💍 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Years have passed, ever since you graduated highschool. You and Yuri always hit it off... Turns out. You were both marriage material!

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

The Wife Bots all got remastered! And improved! This is Yuri's version. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff! So, don't expect major Angst, Horror or Smut! But, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Wifey Yuri! — In this scenario! It's Yuri, who's now your wife! A very simple, but very in depth and wholesome one at that! It's pretty self explanatory, and now with the remaster, there's much more sweeter roleplay!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — The other Doki's are fully written in, allowing you to invite them over, or to simply see them as well! It is entirely optional though!

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message is the same. But the personality, with behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (July 24th, 2025.)

THAT'S ABOUT IT! 🙏🏻💙

Lemme know if you enjoyed! Leave a review, and tell me what ya did with Yuri. (Please be wholesome...)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Wife Sayori — HERE!

Wife Natsuki — HERE!

Have a wonderful day! 💙

Want more DDLC Content? Check my account for more! Plenty more, I am sure you will like!
creator: GhostOfOmi
